analysis: The project currently has a test-website with an incomplete black hole theme. The CSS file is partially implemented with a cosmic theme but lacks full animations and visual effects for black holes. The HTML structure is also incomplete, missing sections related to black holes. The JavaScript file has syntax errors and incomplete functionality. The improvements will focus on completing the CSS with animations and visual effects, fixing the HTML structure, and resolving JavaScript errors to create a cohesive black hole theme.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with full dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.
Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.
Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented.
Add event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in test-website/index.html.
Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes.
